creator: luzpaz@pm.me
text:
According to: 
https://github.com/IfcOpenShell/IfcOpenShell/releases?q=ifcopenshell-python&expanded=true 
the latest version of ifcopenshell is 0.8.0 
https://github.com/IfcOpenShell/IfcOpenShell/releases/tag/ifcopenshell-python-0.8.0

The ifcopenshell devs are planning to cut a new release immanently (0.8.1) per https://github.com/FreeCAD/FreeCAD/pull/17327#issuecomment-2439658114
